one_time_description: COVID-19 expenses of $3,460,956 recorded as a separate expense category
economic_notes: Fort A La Corne Ventures LP is a GBE with 99.99% ownership, reporting a net loss of $642,293. JSCN Medical Clinic LP exists as a separate entity with BMO loans guaranteed by JSCN. Multiple negotiation settlement loans outstanding totaling $2,801,630 from Government of Canada and $7,451,215 from RBC. Nation is member of Prince Albert Grand Council.
notes: Consolidated entity includes James Smith Cree Nation Operations and CMHC Housing; governed by three bands (James Smith, Chakastaypasin, Peter Chapman). Fort A La Corne Ventures LP recorded under modified equity method as GBE with net loss of $642,293. Significant COVID-19 expenses of $3,460,956. Large loan guarantees outstanding: $2.8M Government of Canada negotiation loans, $7.45M RBC treaty loans, and BMO loans to JSCN Medical Clinic LP (note cut off in source). Multiple deferred capital project funds for lagoon, flood roads, waste station. Fiscal year 2021 statements signed December 14, 2021. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, Health Canada, PAGC, and CMHC grants (government transfers).
